candidates.why: Best representation of top-line revenue; other candidates are financial income or bottom-line measures, not sales.
Represents financial/interest income, not operating revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.
Purely interest income, not operating revenue.
Interest and similar financial income, not sales revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income measure, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Company does not show a separate ‘Revenue’ line; ‘Total Income’ appears to aggregate operating income and is the best proxy for top-line revenue.

candidates.why: Component of operating costs but likely overhead rather than direct COGS; used only if no explicit COGS exists.
Main bucket of operating costs including R&D and G&A; in absence of a separate cost of sales line, this is the closest proxy to total operating costs/COGS.
Financing costs, not production or service costs.
Financial, not operating, costs.
Specific operating expense, not full COGS.
Component of operating expenses but not full COGS on its own.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement COGS line.

variables.notes: No explicit ‘Cost of sales’ or ‘COGS’ line is present. ‘Operating expenses’ is used as the closest available proxy for total operating cost, even though it includes R&D and G&A.

candidates.why: Classic SG&A component representing personnel/overhead costs.
Likely SG&A-type overhead costs; suitable as an SG&A component.
Directly matches G&A, a core part of SG&A.
Total operating expense bucket including non-SG&A items like R&D; should not be used as an SG&A component total per instructions.

variables.notes: Selected discrete SG&A-type components and intentionally excluded the aggregate ‘Operating expenses’ total in line with the instructions.

candidates.why: Explicit research and development expense line.
Primary interest expense line; appears twice in the sheet but can only be selected once by label.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest expense specifically related to lease liabilities; relevant if main interest expense line is missing for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-related interest; useful fallback for some periods.
Interest income, opposite of interest expense; not used for XINT.
Interest and similar income; not an expense line and thus not appropriate for XINT.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Multiple interest expense-related rows are provided as a priority list so later processing can pick the first available per year. Only expense (not income) lines are used.

candidates.why: Component of equity but not the full shareholders’ equity; less suitable than ‘Total Equity’ for BE.
Represents total shareholders’ equity; no separate non-controlling interests line is present, so this is an appropriate BE measure.
Balancing artifact, not a primary reported equity total.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity itself.
Represents total assets/liabilities, not equity alone.

variables.notes: No separate non-controlling interest line appears, so ‘Total Equity’ is used directly as book equity attributable to owners.
No line resembling non-controlling interests or minority interest is present on the balance sheet; MIB is therefore set to 0 via an empty selection.
